requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline and Tropical Heat Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线及热带高温降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線及熱帶高溫降額

summary.en: Timor-Leste EV charger projects should be documented to the IEC 61851 safety baseline where IEC equipment is specified. IEC 61851-1 covers conductive EVSE general safety requirements including control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation, interlocks, overcurrent protection, over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23 applies to DC EV charging stations. Timor-Leste's market is pre-nascent and requires careful documentation of enclosure rating, UV resistance, heat and humidity derating, cable temperature rise, and project acceptance even where broad public EV standards are not yet mature.
summary.zh: 在东帝汶项目指定IEC设备时，电动汽车充电桩文件应按IEC 61851安全基线准备。IEC 61851-1涵盖传导式EVSE通用安全要求，包括控制导引、保护接地、绝缘、互锁、过流保护、过温保护以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23适用于直流电动汽车充电站。东帝汶市场仍处于起步阶段，即使缺乏成熟的公共充电体系，机柜防护等级、抗紫外、热湿降额、电缆温升和项目验收仍是关键问题。
summary.zht: 在東帝汶項目指定IEC設備時，電動汽車充電樁文件應按IEC 61851安全基線準備。IEC 61851-1涵蓋傳導式EVSE通用安全要求，包括控制導引、保護接地、絕緣、互鎖、過流保護、過溫保護以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23適用於直流電動汽車充電站。東帝汶市場仍處於起步階段，即使缺乏成熟的公共充電體系，機櫃防護等級、抗紫外、熱濕降額、電纜溫升和項目驗收仍是關鍵問題。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — EV conductive charging system general requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
Timor-Leste market-level conformity context through ANE and relevant energy authorities

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging systems, with GB/T 20234 connector and GB/T 27930 communication requirements. It is structurally useful for engineering review, but China GB/T evidence does not replace IEC 61851 clause evidence, IEC connector-specific tests, or Timor-Leste project acceptance documentation. China domestic ambient assumptions may understate Timor-Leste tropical heat stress.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求，并配套GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930通信要求。该基线可用于工程审查，但中国GB/T证据不能替代IEC 61851条款证据、IEC接口专项测试或东帝汶项目验收文件。中国国内环境假设可能低估东帝汶热带高温应力。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求，並配套GB/T 20234接口和GB/T 27930通訊要求。該基線可用於工程審查，但中國GB/T證據不能替代IEC 61851條款證據、IEC接口專項測試或東帝汶項目驗收文件。中國國內環境假設可能低估東帝汶熱帶高溫應力。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC chargers, IEC 60529 enclosure reports, protective-device ratings, emergency-stop and interlock documentation, temperature-rise evidence for Type 2 cable assemblies, and derating data for sustained tropical heat and moisture. GB/T 18487.1-2023 evidence alone is not enough for an IEC-direction Timor-Leste project.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流充电桩IEC 61851-23证据、IEC 60529机柜报告、保护器件额定值、急停和互锁文件、Type 2电缆组件温升证据，以及针对持续热带高温和潮湿的降额数据。仅有GB/T 18487.1-2023证据不足以支持东帝汶IEC方向项目。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流充電樁IEC 61851-23證據、IEC 60529機櫃報告、保護器件額定值、急停和互鎖文件、Type 2電纜組件溫升證據，以及針對持續熱帶高溫和濕氣的降額數據。僅有GB/T 18487.1-2023證據不足以支持東帝汶IEC方向項目。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but practically required where IEC 61851 evidence is specified by ANE, the project owner, or an EPC tender; thermal derating is critical for tropical deployment
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not direct IEC 61851 evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. A Timor-Leste IEC-direction charger package should include IEC 61851 safety evidence, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence where relevant, enclosure protection reports, and tropical heat-humidity derating data.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。东帝汶IEC方向充电桩资料包应包括IEC 61851安全证据、适用时的直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、机柜防护报告和热带高温湿度降额数据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。東帝汶IEC方向充電樁資料包應包括IEC 61851安全證據、適用時的直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、機櫃防護報告和熱帶高溫濕度降額數據。
